task_completion.description: Verify that a chart for SPY with a Daily timeframe is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day') displayed in the chart tab, title bar, or data box.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first CandleStickPattern indicator is configured for Doji in Blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows 'CandleStickPattern' added, with its properties set to detect the 'Doji' pattern and the plot/marker color set to 'Blue'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second CandleStickPattern indicator is configured for Hammer in Magenta.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicators configuration window shows a second instance of 'CandleStickPattern' added, with its properties set to detect the 'Hammer' pattern and the plot/marker color set to 'Magenta'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both indicators are active and visible on the SPY chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main SPY chart displays both Blue markers (for Doji) and Magenta markers (for Hammer) on the candlesticks, or the chart's top-left label/data box lists both instances of the CandleStickPattern indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace was saved after configuring the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu is accessed and 'Save' is clicked, or the active workspace name in the Control Center footer no longer has an asterisk (*) next to it, indicating it is saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader GUI to configure the chart and indicators.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader 8 dialogs (Chart, Indicators, Control Center) rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying XML/JSON files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the application being interacted with is genuinely NinjaTrader 8.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches NinjaTrader 8's standard interface, including the Control Center, Chart windows, and Indicator configuration panels.

integrity.description: Verify the workspace was saved via the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not use a terminal to copy a pre-made workspace file into the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target instrument is SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). The task requires setting up two separate instances of the 'CandleStickPattern' indicator in NinjaTrader 8 on a Daily chart. One instance must be configured for the 'Doji' pattern (plotted in Blue) and the other for the 'Hammer' pattern (plotted in Magenta). Workspaces are stored in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. Verify that the colors are visually Blue and Magenta on the chart or in the settings.
